---
title: "05_species_meta_regression"
format: html
---

# Setup
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, here, brms, tidybayes, cmdstanr)

```

# Load models and data
```{r}
# load models
null_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_unified/unified_models/unified_model_results_zln_null.rds"))
m5g_zln = readRDS(file = "unified_models/unified_model_results_zln_life_tax_poptls2env2_30.rds")

model_select = m5g_zln

# phylogenetic tree

# natural history traits

```
